# Jami Studio Registry — Full Agent Source

> Jami Studio Registry is the public documentation host for the Jami Studio family: a
> registry of installable shadcn UI components, design tokens, and complete application
> Workspaces, plus the Jami Harness agent runtime. This file is an expanded, agent-friendly
> companion to llms.txt.

Canonical docs host: https://registry.jami.studio/docs
Marketing / OSS hub: https://www.jami.studio/
Machine-readable registry: https://registry.jami.studio/registry.json
GitHub org: https://github.com/studio-jami
NPM scope: @jami-studio

## Composition & Packaging Taxonomy

The Studio composition ladder (developer-facing, how parts combine):

primitive -> component -> block -> page -> app -> workspace

- primitive: an atomic UI part.
- component: a composed control.
- block: a page section (the shadcn-standard term).
- page: a full page.
- app: an application (shell + routes); one or more per workspace.
- workspace: the top-level packaged product, customizable at install — the only
  product-level word. A Workspace is made of apps plus pages, blocks, components, and a theme.

Brand: Jami Studio. Developer foundation: Studio UI. Products: Workspaces.
Jami Studio offers four focused Workspaces: Solo, Business, Mixed Media, and
Research & Writing. Install is interactive: the CLI offers selecting one, some, or all four
Workspaces, or drilling down to any lower level (app, page, block, component) with children
offered as options.

## Jami Harness

Docs: https://registry.jami.studio/docs/harness/overview
Repository: https://github.com/studio-jami/jami-harness

Summary: Jami Harness is an agent runtime for building, running, and verifying AI agents. Its
public interface is a TypeScript SDK (`createHarness()`), a CLI, and JSON-schema contracts —
there is no REST API surface.

Positioning: A contract-first agent runtime with first-class evidence, policy, approvals, and
observability. Reference is Developer Reference (SDK, CLI, Contracts), not a REST API.

Audience: Developers building agentic systems who need reproducible runs, human-in-the-loop
approvals, and verifiable release evidence.

Core concepts: runs, tasks, tools, policy, approvals, artifacts, memory, traces, evidence,
checkpoints.

Reference surface:
- SDK: `createHarness` and the run/approve/resume/inspect surface.
- CLI: the Harness command-line interface.
- Configuration: environment and config options.
- Packages: the package layout (`@jami-studio/*`).

## Studio UI (the registry, components, and Workspaces)

Docs: https://registry.jami.studio/docs/introduction
Repository: https://github.com/studio-jami/studio-ui
Registry endpoint: https://registry.jami.studio/registry.json

Summary: Studio UI is a public registry of installable UI components, design tokens, and
complete application Workspaces, distributed via the shadcn registry protocol. Pull a single
component or an entire Workspace with the `shadcn` CLI.

Positioning: shadcn-compatible building blocks for AI-powered workspace applications —
styled, accessible, and wired for AI agent status display out of the box.

Audience: Product and application developers who use shadcn and want a ready-made design
system plus full Workspace bundles.

Capabilities:
- Install primitives, components, blocks, pages, apps, and full Workspaces.
- Apply the Jami Factory design tokens (CSS variables, Tailwind integration, TypeScript types).
- Select brand options (accent, radius, spacing presets).
- Render Workspaces via the Studio UI renderer/library.

Reference surface:
- CLI: the Studio command-line interface.
- Renderer: renderer/library exports.
- Registry-item schema: the JSON contract for registry items and Workspaces.

Workspaces:
- Solo — https://registry.jami.studio/docs/suites/solo
- Business — https://registry.jami.studio/docs/suites/business-ops
- Mixed Media — https://registry.jami.studio/docs/suites/mixed-media
- Research & Writing — https://registry.jami.studio/docs/suites/research-writing

## Orchestra (vision)

Docs: https://registry.jami.studio/docs/overview/orchestra

Summary: Orchestra is a forward-looking orchestration vision for the family. It is documented
as a vision stub and is not yet a shipping product surface.

## Operations

- Hosting: https://registry.jami.studio/docs/operations/hosting — registry.jami.studio splits
  traffic between the Cloudflare Pages static registry and the Mintlify-hosted /docs route via
  an advanced-mode Worker.
- Release: https://registry.jami.studio/docs/operations/release — how static registry bundles
  are packaged and released.

## Source Policy

This site is the canonical documentation host for the Jami Studio family. Harness prose
originates in the `jami-harness` repository; Studio concepts originate in `studio-ui`; both are
published here. Planning, research, and decisions are maintained in the `studio-jami/ops` hub.
Intercal is a separate product with its own organization and documentation site — linked, not
merged. Customer-visible claims match reality: Harness and Studio UI expose SDK, CLI, and
contract/schema references, not REST endpoints.
